body: The paint on my Accord door doesn't match the rest of the panel.
We are checking the insurance claim status with your adjuster.
Can you confirm the pickup time for the Tacoma after the frame work?
Collision estimate approved for the rear quarter panel repair.
Drafted paint color match notes for the Honda Accord respray.
Thanks for reaching out. Can you share the VIN and color code?
Could you send the final repair invoice as a PDF?
Frame straightening is done and escalating to the paint booth.
Discussed scheduling the Saturday drop-off for the bumper repair.
Estimate for rear bumper repair and paint matching on the Accord.
The color code on the door jamb sticker is 1F7 silver.
Attached the final invoice PDF. Marking this solved.
Order parts: front grille and paint supplies for Accord repair.
Estimate for rear bumper repair and paint matching on the Accord.
Datsun 240Z project: prep primer gray fender panels for evening sanding.
The insurance adjuster still hasn't approved the supplement.
Still no update on the deductible refund after five days.
Parts delivery confirmation: Tacoma TRD brake pads and oil filters.
Parts delivery confirmation: Tacoma TRD brake pads and oil filters.
Review accounts receivable and follow up on the repair invoice.
